notes: NPC ship classes: Fighter / Scout / Prospector / Hauler / Dreadnought spawn per-band from weighted tables. Dreadnoughts roll 1% any band with a red warning label. Salvage drops scale by class (Fighter 1.0 to Dreadnought 4.0). Player's purchased ship faction makes matching-faction NPCs into allies (isPlayerAlly check), 20% friendly bleed in rival sectors, ALLY green label.
